'''Coriallis''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] near [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|6|Ringers (short story)|reprint=1}}
*{{JournalCite|7|Retreat from Coruscant|reprint=1}}
